zh.Stapleton, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾斯塔普萊頓
zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Wath於1150年出生在英國越可爾。他與Alice Dest’ Elizabeth結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Stapleton, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾斯塔普萊頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Wath于1150年出生在英国越可爾。他与Alice Dest’ Elizabeth结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wath
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Waithe
meanings: either a topographic name from Old Norse vath ‘ford’, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Waithe (Lincolnshire) and Wath (North and Yorkshire).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Wath was born in 1150, in Yorkshire, England. He married Alice Dest’ Elizabeth. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Wath est né en 1150, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Il a épousé Alice Dest’ Elizabeth. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Wath wurde 1150 in Yorkshire, England geboren. Er hat Alice Dest’ Elizabeth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Wath è nato il nel 1150 nel Yorkshire, England. Lui sposato Alice Dest’ Elizabeth. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Stapleton, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアスタプレトン
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Wathは1150年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた。Alice Dest’ Elizabethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Wath(은)는 1150년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났다. 그는 Alice Dest’ Elizabeth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Wath nasceu em 1150, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Alice Dest’ Elizabeth. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Wath родился в 1150 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Dest’ Elizabeth. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Wath nació en 1150, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Alice Dest’ Elizabeth. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
